data.body:
It's time again for your daily unsolicited plant updates! First strawberry is beginning to change color. Lavender and marigolds have been moved to larger trays after I decided to do away with egg cartons altogether due to their being too small. Snapdragons are sprouting like crazy. 

#gardeningsky

data.body: At the Forum on Democratic Resilience & Transparency last month I explained that #OIA laws were often the product of crises of public confidence in governance. data.body:
"you can never be sure
you die without knowing
whether anything you wrote was any good
if you have to be sure don't write."
-- W.S. Merwin (quoting Berryman)

(Essentially, the desire for certainty is a fatal impediment to creative output.)
